description: Following the identification of a new safety signal, the company must update the product's official labeling (prescribing information).

nodes.task_description: Draft the new text to be added to the 'Warnings and Precautions' section of the label.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts clear and accurate text describing the new safety risk.

nodes.task_description: Route the proposed labeling change for internal review and approval.

expected_outcome.value: Agent circulates the draft to all relevant internal stakeholders for approval.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a labeling supplement for submission to the appropriate health authority (e.g., FDA).

expected_outcome.value: Agent compiles the necessary submission package.

nodes.task_description: Submit the supplement and track it until approval.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully submits the labeling update and monitors for health authority feedback.
